anomalies.message: Source repo Kaoyan-Math1-Papers is dirty at commit 3151b4ac. 7 modified tracked files, 2 untracked directories. None of the dirtied files overlap with 2001 year content.
anomalies.resolutionMdFinalization: Confirmed: dirty files are 1987, 1988, 2003, 2020, 2024 papers + 2003/2020 solutions — none overlap with 2001. Source mirror contains correct 2001 files.
anomalies.humanAction: Acknowledge dirty repo state does not affect 2001 content.

anomalies.message: Question 6 all four options (A)(B)(C)(D) are image references only. The stem f(x) graph is also an image. Answer correctness cannot be verified from text alone.
anomalies.resolutionMdFinalization: Cannot resolve from Markdown — images are essential. Solution text reasoning (monotonicity analysis) identifies (D) as answer. Human visual verification required.
anomalies.humanAction: Open the original PDF or image files. Visually confirm f(x) graph and 4 f'(x) candidate graphs.

anomalies.message: Questions 11-20 had no explicit 【答案】 markers in source solution file. Answers were embedded in explanation text.
anomalies.resolutionMdFinalization: RESOLVED in md-finalization. All 10 answers extracted from solution explanation text with answerExtractionNote documenting source location. q15 set to not_applicable (proof).
anomalies.humanAction: Verify extracted answers against solution derivation and PDF.

anomalies.message: Question 17 solution in source file line 254 has garbled determinant formula using \begin{array}{r} without vertical bars.
anomalies.resolutionMdFinalization: Staging corrected to \begin{vmatrix}. Mathematical context (cyclic matrix determinant = t₁ˢ + (-1)ˢ⁺¹t₂ˢ) supports the correction. Human should verify against PDF.
anomalies.humanAction: Compare source PDF page for question (17) against corrected vmatrix formula.

anomalies.message: OCR letter/digit spacing artifacts in explanations: \operatorname {d i v} (q02), \frac {1 3} (q16).
anomalies.resolutionMdFinalization: RESOLVED in md-finalization. q02: \operatorname {d i v} → \operatorname{div}, \mathbf {g r a d} → \mathbf{grad}. q16: \frac {1 3} → \frac{13}, {1 2} → {12}.
anomalies.humanAction: No action needed — cosmetic fixes applied, renders correctly.

anomalies.message: Questions 15, 18, 19 have sub-parts (1)(2) in their stem. Kept as single questions per solution numbering.
anomalies.resolutionMdFinalization: Granularity confirmed correct per solution file structure. No change needed.
anomalies.humanAction: Confirm whether to keep as single questions or split into sub-questions.

anomalies.message: Question 7 option A was inline in paper stem text. Staging correctly extracted.
anomalies.resolutionMdFinalization: Confirmed correct extraction. No content missing.

anomalies.message: Question 7 has mixed Chinese/English punctuation from OCR.
anomalies.resolutionMdFinalization: Cosmetic — does not affect mathematical correctness. Low priority.

mdFinalizationSummary: 12 original anomalies reduced to 4 active (2 warning, 2 info) after md-finalization. 8 anomalies resolved: answer extraction for q11-20, OCR spacing fixes for q02/q16, multi-part question confirmation, inline option confirmation, punctuation documentation. Remaining: source repo dirty (acknowledged), q06 image-only options (requires visual inspection), q17 determinant source garbled (corrected but needs PDF verification). No blocked questions.
